{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603201535570044E4BFAE249ADF6F23\"}"},"total":963},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7241921866340139809","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一部军事小说系列，通过生动的描写和紧张的情节，展现了特种兵的英勇形象和精湛的战斗技巧。故事中，主人公经历了一系列的考验和战斗，展现出坚韧不拔的精神和顽强的意志。作者通过精彩的战斗场面和人物的心理描写，将读者带入了一个充满挑战和危险的世界。读者在阅读中能够感受到战争的残酷和特种兵们为国家和人民付出的无私奉献，同时也能感受到英雄们的荣耀和豪情。","text_exts":[{"e":31,"s":28,"text":"特种兵","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E7%89%B9%E7%A7%8D%E5%85%B5\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739921579ADF6F23%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227241921866340139809%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227097149304334191646%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%89%B9%E7%A7%8D%E5%85%B5%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1686141470,"group_id":"7097149304334191646","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5eKGsKp+HLaxOUAeJ8vqp+xeUaNQg09P+scvgf+AE6Y","gender":0,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4207154224693443","user_name":"用户42071542"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4207154224693443","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7097149304334191646","book_info":{"abstract":"军区大院长大的孟军，被自己老爸逼着参加军校选拔考试，以优异成绩去军校学习提高，在军校期间凭借良好的身体反应，过硬的军事素质，不断挑战自我。在各种训练、演习的过程中，他英勇无畏，智谋过人，和战友一起不断推陈出新，出其不意地取得演习的良好分数，也逐渐转变了以前太过桀骜不驯的心态，有着“军中小霸王”混号的他，很快地成长为一名优秀的军官，数次与死神擦肩而过，在血与火的考验，完成一次又一次的任务……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/90116d27452acf53de2623474c93e27f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"李建林
